notes: Central Plant Identity Registry (Model C: authoritative identity layer; the plant catalog remains the descriptive data layer). Covers every non-conflicted canonical catalog identity: verified alias slugs are collapsed into their canonical entry and verified cross-module keys are bridged. Avocado is a single canonical identity (Persea americana). Strawberry-guava is a single canonical identity (accepted Psidium cattleyanum; scientific synonym Psidium cattleianum); the inline PLANT_LIBRARY still contains two descriptive strawberry-guava rows pending a separate catalog-deduplication task. Remaining same-slug duplicate conflict (mulberry) stays in duplicateConflicts. NOT wired into runtime as authoritative. Nine pilot plantId values are assigned (lavender, lemon, olive, pomegranate, apple, fig, coconut, papaya, japanese-maple); all other canonical identities remain unassigned. Runtime does not consume plantId yet. No plant records were renamed, merged, or deleted in the catalog. Genus-level / 'Various' identities are marked needsReview:true with acceptedScientificName omitted pending editorial review. Entries are ordered by canonicalSlug for stable diffs. Record references captured during the read-only Canonical Identity Audit must be re-verified before any cleanup.

canonicalIdentities.notes: Genus-level catalog scientific name (Agapanthus spp.); species not reliably determined. acceptedScientificName omitted pending editorial review before allocation.
Variant slug pair within the inline PLANT_LIBRARY namespace. 'apple-tree' is an alias of 'apple' (both Malus domestica).

Identity-layer resolution of the former same-slug duplicateConflict. Species-level identity is Persea americana. Inline PLANT_LIBRARY still contains two descriptive rows sharing slug 'avocado'; catalog deduplication of those rows is a separate future task. This entry does not merge care, products, climate, guide, status, icon, mark, or UI-copy fields.

Catalog record is a non-species group ('Various succulent species'), not a single canonical species. Needs editorial review before allocation.

duplicateConflicts.notes: Two distinct records share slug 'mulberry'. Genus-level 'Morus spp.' only (species not reliably determined). Documented only. No record correction, merge, or deletion in this task.
